chosen_action.title: Harden comparison-page Codeberg-first evaluator CTA with regression coverage

why_this_action.reasoning: Outbound overlap is still in a measurement hold and conversion_to_free_use is the active bottleneck, so the best executable move was to harden the already-shipped comparison CTA path instead of generating another packet.

expected_outcome: Keep the Codeberg-first evaluator path stable across high-intent comparison pages so comparison traffic is more likely to turn into repo inspection and first-run evaluation.
